title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: LANCASTER FAMILY HEALTH CENTER AT BEVERLY SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers breast or cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 3896 Beverly Avenue NE Suite 40 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: -Ages 18-39 needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) regardless of gender -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services regardless of gender -Must live or intend to live in Oregon Household income at or below 250% federal poverty level -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Hours: Monday - Friday: 7:30am - 5:00pm (503) 588-0076 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 588-0076 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT HUMAN REPRODUCTION - COMMUNITY HEALTH SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANCASTER FAMILY HEALTH CENTER AT BEVERLY
